message:
fix(tui): stabilize palette_db_cache tests with serialization mutex

The two palette DB cache tests shared a global OnceLock<Mutex<PaletteDbCache>>
singleton. With parallel test execution, test B could overwrite the cache
between test A's seed and read, causing intermittent failures (left: 11,
right: 7). Fix: add PALETTE_CACHE_TEST_LOCK static mutex and acquire it
at the start of both tests, plus reset the cache before each seed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
